article_items.title: Company : Engadget
article_items.description: [HIGH] EA's Star Wars Zero Company drops August 27 Company : Engadget Summary : Star Wars Zero Company's developers released a gameplay trailer, which features a short appearance by Anakin Skywalker. Link :
